name: Snails Sommeroise / Escargots a La Sommeroise
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the snails by starving them for at least 8 days and washing them in several changes of water until clean. Rinse with vinegar and drain.
2. Place the snails in a saucepan of boiling water with thyme, bay leaf, basil, orange peel, and pork rind. Cook until almost done. Drain and remove from shells.
3. In a separate pan, brown the snails in olive oil with fatty bacon, ground walnuts, anchovy fillets, crushed garlic, salt, pepper, and flour. Thicken the mixture by stirring in the flour.
4. Serve on a bed of spinach that has been washed to remove grit.
Preparation time: 3 hours. Cooking time: 2½ hours.
